prediction:
FROM orders o
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP o.order_id
| AGG o.order_id, SUM(oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS order_amount
| ORDER order_amount DESC
repair_actions: Normalize JOIN predicate direction using schema foreign keys.

tool_trace.selected_reason: highest heuristic priority among executable join candidates

prediction:
FROM customers c
| JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id
| JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| GROUP c.customer_name
| AGG c.customer_name, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.product_id) AS product_types
| ORDER product_types DESC
repair_actions: Remove products join after replacing category-count with product-id count.
Add paid-order filter for order analysis joins.
Count distinct product ids instead of product categories for product-type quantity.

prediction:
FROM order_items oi
| JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
| WHERE o.status = 'paid'
| SELECT oi.item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, (oi.quantity * oi.unit_price) AS line_amount
| ORDER line_amount DESC
| LIMIT 3
